channel.title: Guide on The Gamer's Hollow
channel.description: Recent content in Guide on The Gamer's Hollow

item.title: Arch Linux Install Guide
item.description:
A usefull guide for installing arch linux using the command-line.

Overview

Arch Linux is a linux distro that a lot of people say is too hard to install because you have to do everything yourself, but as arch linux has grown the user base has as well and with that, it has become more simple to install.

This guide is aimed at helping you install arch linux on your device. Let’s get to the installation.

item.title: Running Windows on a Chromebook
item.description:
A guide to installing windows on a Lenove 100e gen2 ast chromebook (for archive purposes)

What you need

  1. A Lenovo 100e/300e gen2 ast Chromebook.
  2. A sd card or usb drive.
  3. A mouse (wired, or dongle only).
  4. Power adapter for the chromebook.
  5. Ventoy downloaded for your OS
  6. Drivers downloaded from this guide.
  7. Tiny11 iso downloaded from this guide.

Downloads

  1. Tiny 11 ISO
  2. Ventoy
  3. Visual C++ Redist
  4. CR50 TPM Driver
  5. Chrome EC Driver
  6. Radeon GPU Drivers !!DO NOT INSTALL UNTIL READING THE GUIDE!!
  7. Radeon GPU Driver Patch
  8. Touchpad Drivers
  9. Touchscreen Drivers
  10. Audio Drivers
  11. 7Zip
  12. Supermium

Getting Started

An Overview

This guide will show you how to go from chromeOS to Windows 11, you will need an internet connection for the chromebook, and also the other requirements listed above

item.title: A Dummies Guide to Jailbreaking Your Wii U
item.description:
What You Need

  • A Wii U with the latest firmware installed (The Wii U can be from any region)
  • An SD card or microSD card with an adapter
  • A computer to copy files to the SD card
  • An internet connection setup on your Wii U

Setting up The SD Card

Plug the SD card into your computer and format it to FAT-32 a guide on how to do that can be found HERE. After formatting the SD card rename it to something other than wiiu as it will not allow you to jailbreak your console if it it names wiiu.
